decoded.explanation: The defendant is a first-time offender who committed a non-violent financial crime. While embezzlement is a serious breach of trust, the amount is relatively modest and there has been a good-faith effort to make restitution. Taking into account the lack of criminal history and the mitigating factor of partial repayment, a short period of incarceration is appropriate to serve as a deterrent and punishment without focusing purely on retributive long-term confinement.
